top_signals.title: Oil Steadies as Traders Weigh Trump’s Latest Iran Threats
top_signals.summary: Oil held steady as traders weighed President Donald Trump’s newest threat to resume strikes on Iran, a pledge the US leader has made repeatedly before backing off since a truce started in early April.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump orders government, Fed to review crypto firms' access to payment rails
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Investment Bank Lincoln International’s IPO Raises $421 Million
top_signals.summary: Mid-market investment bank Lincoln International Inc. and its backers raised nearly $421 million in an US initial public offering priced at the top of the marketed range.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
